languages.text: {n}Ein leises Stöhnen hallt unter der goldenen Maske des jungen Mannes wider.{/n} "Ich hoffe... vielleicht... wirst du deine Meinung ändern."
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet moan echoes from under the young man's golden mask.{/n} "I hope... perhaps... you will change your mind."

languages.text: {n}Un gémissement silencieux résonne sous le masque d'or du jeune homme.{/n} "J'espère... peut-être... que vous changerez d'avis."
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet moan echoes from under the young man's golden mask.{/n} "I hope... perhaps... you will change your mind."

languages.text: {n}年轻人的金色面具下回荡着一声低沉的呻吟。{/n}"我希望......也许......你会改变主意。"
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet moan echoes from under the young man's golden mask.{/n} "I hope... perhaps... you will change your mind."

languages.text: {n}Un gemido silencioso resuena bajo la máscara dorada del joven.{/n} "Espero que... tal vez... cambies de opinión".
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet moan echoes from under the young man's golden mask.{/n} "I hope... perhaps... you will change your mind."

languages.text: {n}Genç adamın altın maskesinin altından sessiz bir inilti yankılanıyor.{/n} "Umarım... belki... fikrini değiştirirsin."
